tagline: Driving financial discipline, operational resilience and donor compliance across multi-country development portfolios.
professionalSummary: Visionary Chief Financial and Operations Officer (CFO/COO) with 25+ years of experience directing $150M+ global health and development portfolios. Expert in resource allocation strategy, cost recovery and institutional resilience within complex donor-funded environments. Proven track record in navigating high-inflation markets, driving digital transformation and securing 98%+ compliance across CDC, USAID and Global Fund frameworks.

workExperience.title: Director of Operations / Finance & Operations Lead
achievements: Led financial strategy and resource allocation for a $20M annual portfolio.
Secured a 98% donor compliance rate by redesigning internal audit and statutory reporting cycles.
Hardened oversight of a $12M asset inventory including a 100-vehicle fleet.
Mentored a 40-person cross-border team toward strategic financial partnership.
Achieved 40–60% operational cost savings across five countries through shared services design.
Eliminated a projected USD 1 million budget overrun through structured financial recovery.
Reduced transaction cycles by 40% through SharePoint and ERP optimisation.

workExperience.company: Centres for Disease Control and Prevention
workExperience.title: Cooperative Agreement Specialist / Grants Manager
achievements: Stewarded a $36M annual PEPFAR portfolio across 40+ implementing partners.
Boosted partner audit readiness by 30% through targeted capacity-building workshops.
Achieved 100% on-time approval rate for Country Operational Plan work plans.
Mitigated fiduciary risk through deep-dive financial forensic reviews and field site visits.
Standardised the proposal and budget review framework for 100% CDC compliance.

workExperience.company: Centres for Disease Control and Prevention
workExperience.title: Budget Analyst
achievements: Synchronised $10M in programme funding as primary budget liaison between CDC Kenya and the U.S. Embassy.
Co-developed a custom budget and financial module within the FileMaker database.
Designed project-status templates for 10+ distinct CDC programmes.
Built a burn-rate forecasting model to prevent year-end funding lapses.

workExperience.title: Head of Finance
achievements: Stabilised financial oversight for $24M in annual research funding across 10+ global donors.
Resolved long-standing audit bottlenecks, clearing prior findings from 2004.
Served as key member of the Navision ERP working group, modernising the institute's accounting function.
Designed a unified internal control framework for procurement and payroll across multiple grant cycles.

workExperience.title: Senior Accountant
achievements: Supervised a finance team of seven including three Senior Accountants.
Eliminated a 15% discrepancy in budget forecasting through a custom commitment tracking template.
Recovered 60% of outstanding staff debt within the first year.
Secured 100% accuracy in monthly bank reconciliations across all organisation accounts.
Accelerated vendor payment cycles by 25% through a new reconciliation workflow.

workExperience.title: Plant Accountant
achievements: Managed the full-cycle financial recording for plant operations, transforming raw production data into accurate monthly management accounts that guided the factory's daily commercial decisions.
Cut month-end closing time by 20% by playing a lead role in the migration to the BaaN ERP system, mapping manual accounting workflows into automated digital modules.
Recovered 5% of annual operating margins by redesigning the production costing and variance analysis models to catch waste in raw material usage early in the manufacturing cycle.
Achieved a 99% inventory accuracy rate by implementing a rigorous cycle counting and reconciliation process for both raw materials and finished goods across the plant.
Streamlined the payroll and VAT filing process for the entire plant workforce, ensuring 100% on-time statutory compliance and eliminating the risk of late-filing penalties.
Hardened the oversight of the plant's fixed asset register by conducting systematic physical verifications, ensuring that depreciation and capital maintenance costs were precisely tracked.
Optimised the factory's working capital by negotiating tighter credit terms with suppliers and improving the speed of the accounts payable reconciliation cycle.
